title: Prepare handpieces and downtubes for machine shearing
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Prepare handpieces and downtubes for machine shearing demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare combs and cutters for shearing

pcs.text: Select combs and cutters to suit fleece type and shearing conditions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select combs and cutters to suit fleece type and shearing conditions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select combs and cutters to suit fleece type and shearing conditions.

pcs.text: Communicate with supervisor to check combs and cutters for serviceability and prepare according to workplace procedures and work health and safety (WHS) and biosecurity standards
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Communicate with supervisor to check combs and cutters for serviceability and prepare according to workplace procedures and work health and safety (WHS) and biosecurity standards?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Communicate with supervisor to check combs and cutters for serviceability and prepare according to workplace procedures and work health and safety (WHS) and biosecurity standards.

pcs.text: Select and use appropriate personal protective equipment (PPE)
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select and use appropriate personal protective equipment (PPE)?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select and use appropriate personal protective equipment (PPE).

pcs.text: Identify comb and cutter faults or malfunctions and report for repair or replacement to appropriate person
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify comb and cutter faults or malfunctions and report for repair or replacement to appropriate person?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify comb and cutter faults or malfunctions and report for repair or replacement to appropriate person.

pcs.text: Clean combs and cutters prior to sharpening
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Clean combs and cutters prior to sharpening?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clean combs and cutters prior to sharpening.

pcs.text: Change combs and cutters during the shearing operations to suit shearing conditions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Change combs and cutters during the shearing operations to suit shearing conditions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Change combs and cutters during the shearing operations to suit shearing conditions.

pcs.text: Identify potential and existing hazards and report to supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify potential and existing hazards and report to supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify potential and existing hazards and report to supervisor.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare combs and cutters for shearing
